project.name: The Witness
project.local_vantage: subtle; do not overfocus on location
project.editorial_mandate: Maintain non-Western vantage point. Prevent US-centric tech feed bias. Weight regional and Global South voices equally with Western sources.

sources.title: Millions gather in Mecca for Hajj despite security concerns
sources.author: FRANCE24
sources.summary: Despite security concerns linked to the conflict in the Middle East, pilgrims from around the world continue to arrive in Mecca for this year’s Hajj. Saudi officials say more than 1.5 million people have already reached the kingdom, with numbers expected to rise further as many say they are willing to take the risk to complete the pilgrimage.

sources.title: Show HN: Geomatic – a command-driven geometry studio enabled with autodiff
sources.author: nivter
sources.summary: All commands have the format `output = \func inputs` or just `\function inputs`. Points and scalars are built on the fly. Eg `\line a b` to an empty canvas creates points `a` and `b`, and joins them with a line.
